subject: Add logging info for resource querying.
commit_message:
Add logging info for resource querying.

This patch enables logging info while querying for resource in
ConfigResource and OperationalResource.

The logger was previously just imported but not actually used.

Change-Id: I861f2ee2c911c757d900a5c18c5dbf97db905fa5
Signed-off-by: Shashank Kumar Shankar <shashank.kumar.shankar@intel.com>
